themes.label: Salvation

themes.label: Peace/Rest
themes.summary: This chapter offers peace, rest, stillness, comfort, or settled safety in God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "How do you pursue peace before resorting to conflict in relationships or situations?".
